name: Cheese and Corn Chowder
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Potatoes, Peeled and Chopped Finely
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine the chopped potatoes, water, bouillon granules, ground red pepper, and black pepper. Bring to boiling; reduce heat.
2. Cover and simmer about 10 minutes or until the potatoes are tender, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in 2 1/2 cups of the milk and the corn. In a small bowl, stir together the remaining 1/2 cup milk and flour; stir into the potato mixture.
4. Cook and stir over medium heat until slightly thickened and bubbly. Continue cooking and stirring for 1 minute more.
5. Add cheese; stir until melted. Spoon into 4 soup bowls. Top each serving with parsley.
